tasks.label: Run Bleep menu bar (debug)
tasks.detail: Builds bleep-gateway in release, kills stale instances, runs the menu-bar app in debug. Click 'Open Dashboard…' on the tray to open the live UI.

tasks.label: Stop Bleep
tasks.detail: Kill any running bleep-menu-bar and bleep-gateway processes and clean up port files.
tasks.command: pkill -f bleep-menu-bar; pkill -f bleep-gateway; rm -f /tmp/bleep-stats.port /tmp/bleep-events.port; echo 'stopped.'
